title: Vanessa Marshall
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image=[[File:VanessaMarshall.jpg]] |name=Vanessa Marshall |birth=[[October 19]], [[1960s|1969]]{{ThisWeek|WDz6G4BMe7c|The Mandalorian Season Two Hype, Tales from the Galaxy's Edge Action, and More!}} |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality= |occupation=Voice actress |companies= |website=[http://vanessamarshall.com vanessamarshall.com] }} {{Quote|Hera is at the heart of the ''Ghost'' crew. She is both an ace pilot and a skilled fighter. She is the getaway driver, and, while she is a tough cookie, she also manages to be quite nurturing, if not maternal, as she guides and inspires her band of 'rebels.'|Vanessa Marshall, on Hera Syndulla|{{InsiderCite|151|Hera: A New Breed of Hero}}}} '''Vanessa Marshall''' (born [[October 19]], [[1960s|1969]]) is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] voice actress and model, and the daughter of veteran actress [[Wikipedia:Joan Van Ark|Joan Van Ark]]. She voiced the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] [[Twi'lek]] [[pilot]] character [[Hera Syndulla]] as main character on the animated series ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' and as recurring character on the animated series ''[[Star Wars: The Bad Batch]]''{{SW|url=news/vanessa-marshall-interview-star-wars-the-bad-batch|text=Hera Flies Again: Vanessa Marshall on Returning as the High-Flying Pilot in ''Star Wars: The Bad Batch''}} and later voiced [[Rook Kast]] for the [[The Clone Wars: Season Seven|seventh season]] of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''. Marshall has provided the voice for [[Jan Ors]] in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'', as well as additional voices for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. Marshall voiced [[Rebel pilot]] [[Wona Goban]] in the [[2016]] [[Star Wars Anthology Series|film]] ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''.{{Twitter|vanmarshall|status/810961852804931584|Vanessa Marshall|quote=@KTonarella I played a REBEL PILOT in the final scene. :0)|archiveurl=https://archive.is/Qs0qm}} {{Bio-stub}} ==Works== ===Gameography=== {| {{Prettytable}} !
